com.rscja.deviceapi.interfaces

Interface IUR4

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IMultipleAntenna, IUHF
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    RFIDWithUHFNetworkUR4, RFIDWithUHFSerialPortUR4, SPUR4Linux, SPUR4Windows

    public interface IUR4
extends IUHF, IMultipleAntenna

    • Method Detail

      • setGPODEV_V10

        boolean setGPODEV_V10(byte output1,
                      byte output2,
                      byte output3,
                      byte relay)

      • setGPOWYD

        boolean setGPOWYD(byte output1,
                  byte output2,
                  byte output3,
                  byte output4,
                  byte relay)

      • setGPO

        boolean setGPO(byte output1,
               byte output2,
               byte relay)
        设置GPIO的输出状态(Set the output state of GPIO)
        Parameters:
        output1 - 0:表低电平(means low level) 1:表示高电平(means high level)
        output2 - 0:表低电平(means low level) 1:表示高电平(means high level)
        relay - 继电器(relay relay) 0:断开(open) 1:闭合(closed)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setGpoOnUR1A

        boolean setGpoOnUR1A(byte output1,
                     byte output2)
        设置UR1A设备GPIO的输出状态(Set the output state of the GPIO on the UR1A device.)
        Parameters:
        output1 - 0:表低电平(means low level) 1:表示高电平(means high level)
        output2 - 0:表低电平(means low level) 1:表示高电平(means high level)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getGPI

        java.util.List<GPIStateEntity> getGPI()
        获取GPIO的输入状态(Get GPIO input state)
        Returns:
        返回GPIO输入状态，null表示获取失败 (returns the GPIO input status, null means the acquisition failed)

      • factoryReset

        boolean factoryReset()
        还原出厂设置(Restore factory settings)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • setIPAndPort

        boolean setIPAndPort(ReaderIPEntity readerIPEntity)
        设置UHF读写器IP和端口信息(Set UHF reader IP and port information) Sample code: UhfIpConfig ipconfig=new UhfIpConfig(); uhfIpConfig.setIp("192.168.99.200"); uhfIpConfig.setPort(8888); uhfIpConfig.setGateway(192.168.99.1); uhfIpConfig.setSubnetMask(255.255.255.0);
        Parameters:
        readerIPEntity - IP和端口信息，目前只支持ipv4 IP,网关,子网掩码，端口 (uhfIpConfig IP and port information, currently only supports ipv4 IP, gateway, subnet mask, port)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getIPAndPort

        ReaderIPEntity getIPAndPort()
        获取UHF读写器IP和端口信息(Get UHF reader IP and port information)
        Returns:
        返回HF读写器IP和端口信息 (returns the IP and port information of the HF reader)

      • setWorkMode

        boolean setWorkMode(int mode)
        设置UHF工作模式 (Set UHF working mode)
        Parameters:
        mode - 0:命令工作模式(command working mode) 1:自动工作模式(automatic working mode)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getWorkMode

        int getWorkMode()
        获取UHF模块工作模式(Get the working mode of the UHF module)
        Returns:
        0:命令工作模式(command working mode) 1:自动工作模式(automatic working mode)

      • setDestinationIPAndPort

        boolean setDestinationIPAndPort(ReaderIPEntity readerIPEntity)
        设置目标IP地址，当使用自动模式和触发模式的时候，数据会自动上传到此地址. (Set the target IP address, when using the automatic mode and trigger mode, the data will be automatically uploaded to this address.)
        Parameters:
        readerIPEntity - uhfIpConfig
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • getDestinationIPAndPort

        ReaderIPEntity getDestinationIPAndPort()
        获取目标IP地址,当使用自动模式和触发模式的时候，数据会自动上传到此地址。(Get the target IP address, when using the automatic mode and trigger mode, the data will be automatically uploaded to this address.)
        Returns:
        获取失败返回null，获取成功返回目标ip地址和端口 (Returns null if the acquisition fails, and returns the target ip address and port if the acquisition is successful)

      • getAntennaReturnLoss

        java.util.List<ReturnLossEntity> getAntennaReturnLoss()
        获取回波损耗 (Obtain the return loss of the antenna.)
        Returns:
        List

      • getAntennaConnectState

        java.util.List<AntennaConnectState> getAntennaConnectState()
        获取天线连接状态(Get antenna connection status.)
        Returns:
        List

      • startInventoryTag

        boolean startInventoryTag(InventoryParameter inventoryParameter)
        开始循环识别标签。 获取标签数据有两种方式，只能二选一，推荐使用方式一。
        Begin looping through the identification labels. There are two ways to obtain label data, only one of the two can be selected. It is recommended to use method one.

        方式一:通过 IUHF.setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback) 这个回调接口获取标签数据，需要在开始盘点之前调用setInventoryCallback方法。
        Method 1: Get the label data through the callback interface IUHF.setInventoryCallback(IUHFInventoryCallback inventoryCallback), you need to call the setInventoryCallback method before starting the inventory.

        方式二:创建一个子线程，在子线程里面通过调用readTagFromBuffer()方法获取标签数据。详情请参见IUHF.readTagFromBuffer()。
        Method 2: Create a sub-thread, and get the tag data by calling the readTagFromBuffer() method in the sub-thread. See IUHF.readTagFromBuffer() for details.

        备注：开启循环识别标签后模块只能响应IUHF.stopInventory()函数 。
        Note: The module can only respond to the IUHF.stopInventory() function after the loop identification tag is turned on.
        Specified by:
        startInventoryTag in interface IUHF
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)

      • marginRead

        boolean marginRead(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                   FilterEntity filterEntity,
                   int bank,
                   int ptr,
                   int cnt,
                   java.lang.String marginReadData)
        MarginRead
        Specified by:
        marginRead in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - ACCESS PASSWORD (4 bites)
        filterEntity - Filter tag
        bank - 标签的存储区(Storage area):IUHF.Bank_RESERVED、IUHF.Bank_EPC、IUHF.Bank_TID、IUHF.Bank_USER
        ptr - 起始地址的偏移量(start address(unit: word))
        cnt - 数据的长度（Word为单位，不能为0）(Data length(Word is unit, cannot be 0))
        marginReadData - 十六进制数据 (Data format should be hexvalue)
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(fail)

      • setProtectedModeAndShortRangeMode

        boolean setProtectedModeAndShortRangeMode(java.lang.String accessPwd,
                                          FilterEntity filterEntity,
                                          boolean isEnalbeProtectedMode,
                                          boolean isEnableShortRangeMode)
        Set Protected Mode And Short Range Mode
        Specified by:
        setProtectedModeAndShortRangeMode in interface IUHF
        Parameters:
        accessPwd - ACCESS PASSWORD (4 bites)
        filterEntity - Filter tag
        isEnalbeProtectedMode - true:Enable Protected Mode false：disable Protected Mode
        isEnableShortRangeMode - true:Enable Short Range Mode false：disable Short Range Mode
        Returns:
        true:成功(success) false:失败(failure)
